scores.rationale: The single-CTA landing and in-place note capture directly satisfy the product journey and safety constraints.
Landing, capture, state transitions, and mobile rules are aligned, though the design deliberately keeps the surface minimal.
Acceptance criteria, ARIA live-region behavior, state encoding, focus rules, and recovery are unusually actionable.
The candidate makes distinct interaction choices such as redundant state encoding and no hero illustration while avoiding source identity.
It explicitly covers live announcements, redundant state labels, focus, contrast, touch sizing, and draft-preserving failure recovery.
Assumptions are separated from claims, the absence of private reference material is disclosed, and corpus evidence is cited for adaptations.
